name: Morphous Horned Lizard
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible defensive utility system drafted from a desert wash horned lizard body: sand tan armor scales, rust horn accents, dark umber side shadows, horn-brown structure, and compact field-operations surfaces.
typography: Geist for terse English utility UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for compact Japanese status labels, route forms, incident tables, sensor dashboards, and tabular operations numerals.
layout: Dense 8px utility grids, angular horn-spine section dividers, 6px to 8px component radius, stable navigation rails, shadow-brown borders, and table-first defensive dashboard rhythm.
